items.summary: Update the header tagline bar (located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[2]/div[1]) to display the text 'Delicious Mexican food for every special occasion' instead of the current tagline text.

Fix the fixed/sticky header in frontend/src/components/Header.tsx so it no longer overlaps the hero section image. The hero section and the girl image must be fully visible and not obscured by the header. Adjust the hero section top padding or offset to account for the header height so the image is completely visible from its top edge.
